title: Better Small Talk
author: Patrick King
subline: Talk to anyone, avoid awkwardness, generate real conversations.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A literal 'small talk' diagram: two speech bubbles facing each other across the cover. Both contain ellipsis dots. The connecting arrow between them is RED — the question that breaks the silence. -->
  <g transform="translate(0 0)" fill="none">
    <!-- Left speech bubble (with tail pointing right) -->
    <g transform="translate(160 880)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="540" height="280" rx="0" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
      <!-- Tail -->
      <path d="M 440 280 L 480 280 L 380 360 Z" fill="#0a0a0a" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
      <!-- Three dots in a row (the 'ellipsis' — what small talk is) -->
      <circle cx="180" cy="140" r="20" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <circle cx="270" cy="140" r="20" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <circle cx="360" cy="140" r="20" fill="#cccccc"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Right speech bubble (with tail pointing left) -->
    <g transform="translate(900 1240)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="540" height="280" rx="0" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
      <path d="M 100 280 L 60 280 L 160 360 Z" fill="#0a0a0a" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
      <circle cx="180" cy="140" r="20" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <circle cx="270" cy="140" r="20" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <circle cx="360" cy="140" r="20" fill="#cccccc"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The connecting arrow between bubbles (the OPEN-ENDED question) — RED -->
    <line x1="640" y1="1240" x2="960" y2="1240" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <polyline points="940 1230 960 1240 940 1250" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
    <!-- A red question mark in the middle of the arrow -->
    <text x="800" y="1255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="40" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46">?</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Two literal speech bubbles, each containing 3 dots (the 'ellipsis' of small talk), facing each other across the cover. Between them: a RED horizontal arrow with a giant red '?' in the middle — the open-ended question that breaks the small-talk loop. Title sits in the middle, weight 500 command, mixed-case. Brand 'OPEN-ENDED' in the bottom-right; pill '?' at the bottom — the only word you really need.
